title: Chapter 4
text: Why do dragons hate spicy salsa? Well, just one drop of hot sauce makes a dragon’s ears smoke. Just one single speck of hot pepper makes a dragon snort sparks. Spicy salsa gives dragons the tummy troubles, and when dragons get the tummy troubles— oh boy . . . If you want to make tacos for dragons, keep the toppings mild. Tomatoes, lettuce, cheese, these are all good toppings for tacos for dragons.
